title: Pyjama Day!
lyrics:
[verse 1]
PJs on when I wake—*splat!*
No socks, no shoes, no chat!
Milk spills, but I don’t care—
Pancakes taste best in cat hair!

[chorus]
Pyjama day! Pyjama day!
Dance in dots and stripes all day!
No one says, “Go get dressed,” hooray—
Pyjama day!

[verse 2]
Jump up high—*boing! boing!*
Cereal crunch, a happy song!
Mama spins me round and round—
Pyjama feet don’t touch the ground!

[chorus]
Pyjama day! Pyjama day!
Dance in dots and stripes all day!
No one says, “Go get dressed,” hooray—
Pyjama day!

[ending]
Milk is warm, my cup’s half gone,
Pyjama dreams till the sun’s up dawn.
style_prompt: Catchy children's song, full musical production, acoustic guitar, bass, and finger snaps, 111 BPM, warm swaying groove, gentle but full, cozy beat, clear warm vocal, strong singalong chorus, every word easy to understand
instruments: acoustic guitar, bass, and finger snaps
scene: The morning sun spills through the kitchen curtains as your bare feet hit the cold linoleum—then you spot the cereal box still in your dinosaur PJs, and with a gasp, you wheel around, arms shooting up like fireworks, shrieking *"Pyjama day!"* at your sleepy-eyed parent holding yesterday’s jeans.
cover_description: A kid in dinosaur PJs leaps off the couch, cereal box flying, milk splashing like a star.
